---
name: ML / Engineering Contribution
about: Propose a new model architecture, data pipeline fix, or frontend feature.
title: "[ENGINEERING] - "
labels: 'enhancement, technical'
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the Feature or Fix:**
Provide a clear description of the technical improvement. Are you improving NoteSequence quantization? Tuning the LSTM? 

**Technical Approach:**
- Which part of the stack is affected? (FastAPI backend, Magenta pipeline, React frontend)
- How do you plan to implement this? Please mention references to MIR papers if applicable.

**Testing Strategy:**
How will you evaluate this? (e.g., Macro-F1 for classification, or specific loss metrics for the sequence model).

**Does this support Tala or Gamaka modeling?**
If yes, briefly explain the data representation.

**Additional Context:**
Add any diagrams, code snippets, or logs.
